arabic: ذِكْرُ اللهِ تَعَالَى يُطَهِّرُ الْقَلْبَ وَيَجْلِبُ الرَّاحَةَ لِلنَّفْسِ. قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: "مَثَلُ الَّذِي يَذْكُرُ رَبَّهُ وَالَّذِي لَا يَذْكُرُ رَبَّهُ، مَثَلُ الْحَيِّ وَالْمَيِّتِ" [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الدَّعَوَاتِ، رَقْمُ 6407]. يَسْتَغْفِرُ الْمُؤْمِنُ رَبَّهُ فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَالْمَسَاءِ. ذِكْرُ اللهِ هُوَ عِبَادَةٌ سَهْلَةٌ وَلَهَا أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ. الصَّلَاةُ وَالتَّسْبِيحُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ أَنْوَاعِ الذِّكْرِ.
translation: Spominjanje Uzvišenog Allaha čisti srce i donosi smiraj duši. Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Primjer onoga koji spominje svoga Gospodara i onoga koji Ga ne spominje je kao primjer živog i mrtvog" [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o dovama, br. 6407]. Vjernik traži oprost od svoga Gospodara ujutro i navečer. Zikr (spominjanje Allaha) je lagan ibadet koji ima veliku nagradu kod Allaha. Namaz i tesbih su među najvažnijim vrstama zikra.
translationEn: Remembering Allah Almighty purifies the heart and brings comfort to the soul. The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "The likeness of the one who remembers his Lord and the one who does not remember his Lord is like the living and the dead" [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Supplications, No. 6407]. A believer seeks forgiveness from his Lord in the morning and evening. Remembering Allah is an easy act of worship and has a great reward with Allah. Prayer and glorification (tasbih) are among the most important types of remembrance.
